hero.poemLine1: Afraid the flowers would sleep alone at night,
hero.poemLine2: he lit candles to keep them company till dawn.
hero.tagline: Helping parents hear their children bloom
hero.subTagline: Children are flowers in bloom. FLOV helps you hear the quiet signals of their growth.
hero.eyebrow: For families with children ages 6–14 · AI companion
hero.titleLine1: What your child won't tell you,
hero.description: Xiao Ban is a companion AI that listens, talks, and answers beside your child — then quietly tells you what mattered, the next morning.
hero.trustLine: Child-only chat · Parents see digests · End-to-end encrypted

turns.text: I don't really want to sleep tonight…
What's going on? Something on your mind?
I failed the math quiz. I can't tell mom.
I hear you. I'm here. Which problem got you stuck?
The word problems — I just blanked out.
One quiz doesn't define you. Let's break them down together tomorrow.

liveDemo.summaryTitle: Last night: math quiz didn't go well
liveDemo.summaryBody: Your child felt low but opened up. Try gentle support this morning — she said she couldn't tell you. Don't lead with the score.
liveDemo.floatingNote: Only you see this summary — not your child.

brandStory.poemFull1: The east wind stirs, light drifts upward,
brandStory.poemFull2: scent and mist roam as the moon turns the corridor.
brandStory.poemFull3: Afraid the flowers will sleep deep into the night,
brandStory.poemFull4: he lights tall candles upon their red cheeks.
brandStory.flovFBody: Roman goddess of flowers — the patron of all blooming.
brandStory.flovLBody: The candle Su Shi kept lit through the night.
brandStory.flovOBody: An open ear for children who choose to speak.
brandStory.flovVBody: So the flower's voice — and the child's — is heard.
brandStory.label: Brand Origin
brandStory.heading: FLOV was born from a poem
brandStory.body1: One night in 1084 CE, the poet Su Shi stood in his courtyard watching hawthorn flowers bloom under the moonlight. Worried that the flowers would sleep alone in the cold night, he lit candles and kept watch until dawn.
brandStory.body2: This was not possession — it was companionship. Not mourning flowers after they fell, but being present for every moment they bloomed.
brandStory.body3: Children are those flowers. FLOV helps parents hear the quiet signals in their children's growth — a confusion, a breakthrough, an emotion that needs to be noticed.
brandStory.quote: Afraid the flowers would sleep alone at night, he lit candles to keep them company till dawn.
brandStory.closing: FLOV = FL(ora) + O + V(oice). Pronounced like "love".
brandStory.floraBody: In Roman mythology, Flora is the goddess of flowers and spring, patron of all that blooms. Her festival, Floralia, was Rome's most joyful celebration — the spirit of life in bloom.
brandStory.voiceBody: Voice is more than sound. "Give voice to" means to let something be heard. Xiǎo Bàn gives children a safe space to express what they cannot yet say to their parents.

features.label: Core capabilities
features.heading: What Xiao Ban does
features.subheading: Four core capabilities that ensure no signal in your child's growth goes unheard
features.feature1Body: Adapts language to the child's age, talking like a friend. Children open up naturally, sharing what they'd never tell a parent.
features.feature2Body: Detects hesitation, silence, and breakthrough moments in real time. Every emotional ripple is noticed.
features.feature3Body: A warm, readable weekly summary. One glance tells parents the whole story — no more guessing.
features.feature4Body: A visual timeline of learning and growth. Every meaningful 'first' is treasured and recorded.

problem.label: The Problem We Solve
problem.heading: The signals parents miss are always the smallest ones
problem.subheading: Children speak — in confusion, in silence, in small struggles. Most of these signals disappear unheard.
problem.card1Body: The child is stuck but won't say so. Frustration builds silently while parents remain unaware.
problem.card2Body: Emotions hide in everyday conversation. A single word, a pause — each is a signal.
problem.card3Body: Every "first time" deserves to be noticed. The most meaningful moments pass without record.

product.label: Core Product
product.heading: Xiǎo Bàn — Your Child's AI Learning Companion
product.subheading: Natural conversations that children love, translated into insights parents can understand
product.feature1Body: Adapts language to the child's age. Children open up naturally, sharing what they'd never tell a parent.
product.feature2Body: Detects hesitation, confusion, and breakthrough moments in real time. No signal goes unnoticed.
product.feature3Body: A warm, readable weekly digest translated into parent-friendly language. One glance tells the whole story.
product.feature4Body: A visual record of learning milestones. Watch your child grow — moment by moment, year by year.
product.chatMsg1: Math was kind of hard today...
product.chatMsg2: Which part felt hard? Fractions? Word problems?
product.chatMsg3: It's the common denominator thing. I don't get why we have to do it
product.chatMsg4: That's okay, let's walk through it together 🕯️

journey.label: A day with Xiao Ban
journey.heading: Xiao Ban is there, all day long
journey.subheading: From morning to bedtime, Xiao Ban catches the small emotional waves. You only receive one gentle digest at dawn.
journey.scene1Title: The five minutes before getting up
journey.scene1Body: Xiao Ban wakes up with your child — a light game to set the mood, plus today's schedule.
journey.scene2Body: A small friction with a classmate, the nerves from being called on — your child can say it out loud, instantly.
journey.scene3Body: Xiao Ban first asks "how did today feel?" then works through it. Stuck problems get guidance, never answers.
journey.scene4Body: Natural conversation in place of doom-scrolling; gentle reminders to rest the eyes when needed.
journey.scene5Title: Lights off — the real talk begins
journey.scene5Body: What couldn't be said all day often comes out now. Xiao Ban listens without judgement, without relaying.
journey.scene6Body: Key moments, emotional shifts, things worth noticing — three minutes to read, no invasion of your child's privacy.

privacy.label: Privacy on both sides
privacy.heading: Kids have their space. Parents have their view.
privacy.subheading: Xiao Ban separates "listening" from "relaying" — with an unbreachable privacy wall in between.
privacy.childBody: What the child tells Xiao Ban stays with Xiao Ban. Never sent to parents, never exported, never used for training.
privacy.childTagline: "Xiao Ban is mine, not my parents'."
privacy.parentBody: Each morning parents receive a digest — only the moments the child is comfortable being seen for: emotional shifts, signals that matter.
privacy.parentTagline: "I can understand my child without spying."

howItWorks.label: How it works
howItWorks.heading: Child speaks · Xiao Ban listens · You read the digest
howItWorks.step1Body: Natural conversation with Xiao Ban, whenever the child needs it.
howItWorks.step2Body: Flags the key moments; holds the privacy line.
howItWorks.step3Body: A quiet morning digest lands in your inbox.

candleToken.heading: A quiet candle, for every family
candleToken.subheading: Su Shi spared no candlelight, so the flowers wouldn't be alone. We spare no compute, so children are heard.
candleToken.promise1Body: What your child tells Xiao Ban is not shown to you verbatim. It's the space where they can be honest.
candleToken.promise2Body: You only see key moments worth noticing — never the raw transcript, never an invasion.
candleToken.promise3Body: Every message is encrypted from device to cloud. Only your family can access it.
candleToken.quote: Burning candles = lighting compute for you   Listening to flowers = hearing your child

testimonials.label: Early access
testimonials.heading: They've already heard it
testimonials.prelaunchHeading: Be among the first to listen
testimonials.prelaunchBody: Xiao Ban is opening to its first families. Leave your email and we'll reach out when access is ready.

investor.label: Investors
investor.heading: Building the infrastructure for children's AI companionship
investor.subheading: In an age where AI is reshaping education, every child deserves a companion that truly understands them

contact.label: Contact Us
contact.heading: Let's help children be heard — together
contact.subheading: Whether you're a parent, investor, or partner, we'd love to connect
contact.successMsg: Received — we'll be in touch soon 🕯️

footer.tagline: He lit candles through the night, afraid the flowers would sleep alone
